---
name: New Prompt Request
about: Request a new base prompt for a Salesforce component type not yet covered
title: "[New Prompt] "
labels: new-prompt
---

## Component type
(e.g. Validation Rule, Formula Field, Apex Trigger, Flow, LWC, etc.)

## Use case
What specific scenario should this prompt cover?

## Why existing prompts don't cover this
(Check `/prompts` first — link to the closest existing prompt if one is related but not sufficient)

## Suggested folder
Which folder under `/prompts` should this live in? (Suggest a new folder if none fit)

## Additional context
Anything else that would help someone write this prompt (sample requirements, edge cases, links).
